creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=181233

This revision removed the rocketport driver due to its lack of maintainer and lack of MPSAFE ness in the TTY layer.

I'm adding Ed for some commentary.  If you guys still need this driver, then some work will have to be done for these ancient cards.
